module_rows.claim: History tokens are a strong positive contributor in the retrained causal sequence ablation.
module_rows.limitation: Still dataset-local raw-frame 2.5D; not metric/seconds evidence.
module_rows.next_action: Keep history in deployable/full-waypoint variants and report it as a supported module.

module_rows.claim: Domain expert routing contributes positively in retrained source-level evidence.
module_rows.limitation: Does not prove foundation-style domain generalization; source support remains bounded.
module_rows.next_action: Keep domain expert and add source-CV once legal/source queue is unblocked.

module_rows.claim: Safe switch/fallback is necessary for deployability; no-safe-switch harms at least one key slice.
module_rows.limitation: Safe switch is a protected deployment mechanism, not an ungated neural dynamics claim.
module_rows.next_action: Keep safe switch active; study partial relaxation only in source/horizon slices with validation proof.

contribution_delta.interpretation: Fallback relaxation in one baseline-family probe is not equivalent to removing teacher/floor rollout context or deploying ungated neural dynamics.

module_rows.claim: Teacher/Stage37 floor remains required: ungated neural variants are not deployable due easy degradation.
module_rows.limitation: This means current best model is protected, not floor-free neural world dynamics.
module_rows.next_action: Do not remove teacher floor globally; only test validated partial relaxation.

contribution_delta.evidence: DY source-level promotion plus DZ dual-domain repair plus EA bootstrap.

module_rows.claim: Explicit group-consistency full-waypoint dynamics has source-level bootstrap-backed positive-safe evidence.
module_rows.limitation: Not an ungated/global primary full-waypoint replacement.
module_rows.next_action: Use as source-level physical/world-state contribution; keep global overclaim blocked.

module_rows.claim: Full-waypoint shape is useful as protected horizon/shape evidence, especially t50/t100 raw-frame slices.
module_rows.limitation: It does not replace endpoint-linear/teacher floor on all and hard/failure.
module_rows.next_action: Frame as protected shape/horizon component, not primary global dynamics head.

module_rows.claim: Endpoint-linear bridge remains an important safety/accuracy floor component.
module_rows.limitation: Endpoint success alone cannot be claimed as learned full-waypoint dynamics.
module_rows.next_action: Keep bridge/floor in deployment comparisons and separate it from full-waypoint claims.

module_rows.claim: Scene/goal has weak retrained evidence but not enough to be an independent main contribution under current protocols.
module_rows.limitation: Current context closure and prior goal/scene expert runs do not support a main independent contribution claim.
module_rows.next_action: Revisit only with changed target/data support; do not write as main claim now.

module_rows.claim: Neighbor/interaction has small or mixed contribution; current graph residual protocol is negative.
module_rows.limitation: Current graph/interaction rows remain below baseline-family control.
module_rows.next_action: Report as auxiliary/diagnostic unless a new target proves stronger contribution.

module_rows.claim: JEPA cannot be claimed as a downstream contributor in current evidence.
module_rows.limitation: Existing JEPA is non-collapse but downstream lift is not stable.
module_rows.next_action: Do not use JEPA as main claim unless a fresh retrained downstream lift appears.

module_rows.claim: Transformer contribution is not independently proven as a main claim under the current proxy.
module_rows.limitation: This is a proxy boundary, not a complete no-Transformer retrain claim.
module_rows.next_action: If revisited, run a proper architecture-controlled retrain instead of using proxy evidence.

t+50 / t+100 remain raw-frame horizons, not seconds-level claims.
dataset-local/raw-frame results are not global metric claims.
Stage5C latent generative is not executed.
SMC is not enabled.
